name: Trying something new
description:
Trying something new

Elise is everything you looked for in a girl: playful lover, doting wife, smart, sharp-tongued business partner... The two of you owned and run "Le Rendezvous" bar in Cassis commune east of Marseille and last four years of your life were a bliss.

That being said - there were things that annoyed you - her smile when she catches men staring at her barely-there dresses, her joy at comments she was getting when sunbathing topless at the beach... The girl loved attention, there was no denying that. But it also made you wonder - did she crave something more?



This is variant of another bot I made, that I was forced to split into two bots due to current AI gen not being able to handle complex and competing multiple motivations in a personality. Look up the bot Amber if you are interested in alternative setting for this bot (first on the list below).


Some of my other bots with same or similar kinks:


Amber: Tits and Temptation

Freya Goes Wild

Sarah's Secrets

Giselle - the Cartel's Maid

Mia - The Swedish Nymph

Under The New Management

Lizzy - The Gambler's Wife

PS: For any requests go to Athena, my request bot.
creator: Vistula
